title: DU-1: Core design — архитектура, модель данных, форматы
description: Спроектировать архитектуру loom, модель данных, форматы артефактов, инварианты и JSON schemas. Результат: sdd.json + schemas/. Эта подзадача изолирована из TASK-2026-0001-bootstrap.

invariants.marker: INVARIANT: JSON must be primary format for all knowledge artifacts; markdown is auto-generated derivative
invariants.verification_method: All knowledge files exist as JSON in knowledge/; markdown files are derivatives

invariants.text: Stack-Agnostic: система не знает о языке/фреймворке
invariants.marker: INVARIANT: No language-specific branching logic in extension code
invariants.verification_method: Code review: no if (language === 'rust') in extension

invariants.text: Task-Centric накопление: каждая задача = атом, знания наследуются
invariants.marker: INVARIANT: Every task has task.json; registry.json is updated; closed tasks are read by agents
invariants.verification_method: Registry contains all tasks; agent prompt includes 'read closed tasks' instruction

invariants.marker: INVARIANT: Subagents use clean sessions; context is assembled from explicit files, not implicit state
invariants.verification_method: Subagent spawner uses --no-context-files; context injected via inputArtifact only

invariants.marker: INVARIANT: All code lives in .pi/extensions/loom/; single agent with different prompts per mode
invariants.verification_method: File system check: extension files under .pi/extensions/loom/ only

invariants.marker: INVARIANT: Model config in subagent-config.json; no hardcoded model strings in extension code
invariants.verification_method: Code review: all model references load from subagent-config.json

invariants.text: Исполнение строго последовательное: шаг N → worker → reviewer → шаг N+1
invariants.marker: INVARIANT: Executor loop cannot spawn more than one worker simultaneously
invariants.verification_method: Executor loop state machine: single active_worker_id; new spawn blocked while active

invariants.text: Локализация: UI и пользовательские артефакты — русский; AI-документация — английский
invariants.marker: INVARIANT: All system prompts, JSON schemas, code comments in English; operator-facing text in Russian; machine markers in English
invariants.verification_method: Localization guard check on all markdown derivatives; English-only audit on schemas and prompts

delivery_units.purpose: Core design: architecture, data model, artifact formats, invariants, JSON schemas. Result: sdd.json + schemas/
